roa.docketEntryComment: /X:PURSUANT TO 1378 OF THE PENAL CODE AND A CIVIL COMPROMISE HAVING BEEN REACHED, THE COURT ORDERS ALL PROCEEDINGS TO BE STAYED UPON THE PROSECUTION,AND THE DEFENDANT IS DISCHARGED,/

/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN:ANNA EPPLE & JOSEPH MINNER/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, TWO COLOR PHOTOGRAPHS; PEOPLE'S 2, TWO COLOR PHOTOGRAPHS; PEOPLE'S 3, TWO COLOR PHOTOGRAPHS /871D: 1/X:THE COURT AMENDSTHE COMPLAINT TO CONFORM TO PROOF; TO ADD COUNT 4, PC 487(C), A MISDEMEANOR; THE COURT REDUCES COUNT 2 TO A MISDEMEANOR; THE COURTFINDS THAT PEOPLE HAVE PROVIDED EVIDENCE OF THE LESSER INCLUDED PC 594(A), A MISDEMEANOR AS TOCOUNT 3/NTW/LD:05-15-08/BAIL:8,000        /DOP/CONTD:TO SET & APPOINTMENT OF NEW PD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:04-15-08/BAIL:30000/SAORD/SA1:ANNA EPPLE/SA2:516 OFARRELL ST 409,SF/X:STAY AT LEAST 10 YARDS AWAY FROM THE ABOVE-NAMED PERSON(S) AND PLACE(S),/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
